title: On Group Relative Policy Optimization Collapse in Agent Search: The Lazy Likelihood-Displacement

defines.name: LLDS
defines.definition: A likelihood-preserving regularization method for GRPO-based tool-integrated reinforcement learning that selectively penalizes only response actions and tokens whose likelihood decreases.

problem: GRPO-based tool-integrated reinforcement learning suffers from training collapse caused by systematic likelihood decay of correct response trajectories.
